propositions: Add an optional Streamable-HTTP transport to rebar-mcp selected by config, with stdio remaining the unchanged default.
Pin the mcp SDK to >=1.28.1,<2 in both the optional-dependencies and dev extras to include the DNS-rebinding fix.
Extend the flat McpConfig dataclass and _SECTIONS['mcp'] coercer with scalar keys for transport, host, port, path, allowed hosts/origins, tls-at-edge, and allow-unauthenticated-http.
Enable DNS-rebinding/Origin protection by default with explicit loopback allowlists, constructed at FastMCP init time to avoid the late-host 421 bug.

Fail closed: a non-loopback bind requires both host and origin allowlists plus an explicit TLS-at-edge acknowledgment, and http with auth off refuses to start unless unauthenticated http is explicitly allowed.
Fix the two doc generators so dynamically-derived REBAR_MCP_* env vars are emitted, keeping MCP_ENV_VARS/server.json authoritative and the manifest drift gate green.
